text: It is unlawful and an infraction for any person to violate any provision of this article or to fail to have any required equipment in good working order.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 5. Other Equipment [27000 - 28160]
#### Article 15. Pilot Cars [28100 - 28103]
##### § 28103

It is unlawful and an infraction for any person to violate any provision of this article or to fail to have any required equipment in good working order.

*(Added by Stats. 1988, Ch. 460, Sec. 4.)*

subsections.text: It is unlawful and an infraction for any person to violate any provision of this article or to fail to have any required equipment in good working order.
